task_description: Create 4 standalone special theme HTML files for the Muslim Clock app: jadwal_sholat_spesial_a3_vertikal.html, jadwal_sholat_spesial_a3_horizontal.html, jadwal_sholat_spesial_a4_vertikal.html, jadwal_sholat_spesial_a4_horizontal.html. Each is a self-contained prayer schedule display page with full-page background (img/temaspesial/background.png), slideshow with frame (img/temaspesial/frame.png), identity section, prayer table, digital clock, running text, and iqamah overlay. A3 has elegant/rounded style, A4 has bold/geometric style.

verification.summary: All 4 HTML files created successfully. XSS vulnerability fixed (safe DOM creation). Post-Isha countdown gap fixed. Verified: file existence, MCAndroid bridge integration, all required element IDs present, background.png and frame.png references, distinct visual styles (A3: rounded 16-20px glass, A4: sharp 2px geometric), vertical uses flex-column, horizontal uses flex-row multi-panel.
